stem: The three programming constructs each control the flow of a program differently.
review_notes: Shuffle-test fixture. Small (3-row) matching widget — eyeball whether the connector lines start on the endpoint dots and end on the target text.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Match each programming construct to the description that defines it.

right: One instruction runs after another in order.
The program branches based on a Boolean condition.
A block of code is repeated while a condition holds.

mark_points.text: Sequence — instructions run one after another
Selection — branches on a Boolean condition
Iteration — repeats while a condition holds
